theme_and_archetype.description: Bright, funny, colorful, mobile-friendly 2D arcade style. High energy, cartoonish, chaotic humor.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase text-yellow-400 drop-shadow-[0_4px_0_rgba(218,41,28,1)]

spacing_and_layout.container: relative w-full h-full max-w-md mx-auto overflow-hidden bg-gray-900 sm:h-[800px] sm:my-8 sm:rounded-[3rem] sm:border-[12px] sm:border-gray-800 shadow-2xl
spacing_and_layout.overlay: absolute inset-0 z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm
spacing_and_layout.hud: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 z-40 flex justify-between items-start pointer-events-none

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFC72C] text-[#DA291C] font-black text-2xl py-4 px-8 rounded-full border-b-8 border-[#DA291C] active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-2 transition-all hover:scale-105 shadow-xl uppercase cursor-pointer

panels.ticket_modal: bg-[#FEF3C7] text-gray-900 p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-lg border-4 border-dashed border-gray-400 shadow-2xl w-11/12 max-w-sm transform -rotate-2 relative
panels.radio_box: bg-gray-900/90 border-2 border-blue-500 text-blue-400 p-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg w-48 text-xs font-mono absolute top-20 right-4 animate-pulse pointer-events-none

game_ui_specifics.start_screen: Vibrant logo layout. Use 'Wanted for Fries' in big yellow text with red stroke/shadow. Subtitle 'Angel: The Stunt Driver'. Tagline 'Based on a true fry-related incident.'
game_ui_specifics.intro_story: A small overlay modal with a comic-style brief: 'Angel dropped a fry... stepped on the gas to reach it... now the cops are everywhere!'
game_ui_specifics.hud_elements: Top-left: distance in meters. Below it, fries icon + count. Top-right: Pause button. Bottom: Mobile control hints (if needed).
game_ui_specifics.police_radio: Typewriter effect text. e.g., 'Suspect is evading... over a french fry?', 'Deploying barriers! She really wants that fry!'
game_ui_specifics.game_over_ticket: Style like a traffic citation. Fields: 'Offense: Fry-ving under the influence', 'Distance Fled', 'Fries Hoarded', 'Fine Amount'. Big 'Pay Fine (Restart)' button.

image_urls.description: French fries box icon for HUD and collectables
Red and white striped road barrier obstacle
Police ticket background for game over modal

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the core gameplay loop using HTML5 Canvas or absolute positioned DOM elements for the cars, obstacles, and scrolling road.
The game should have 3 distinct lanes (Left, Center, Right). Player car smoothly transitions between lanes.
Road background should tile seamlessly vertically and scroll downwards continuously.
Implement Web Audio API for simple sound effects (coin collect, engine hum, crash, police siren).
Police car constantly sits at the bottom edge of the screen, swaying left and right menacingly, moving up slightly if player hits an obstacle.
Use 'react-fast-marquee' or simple CSS animations for the scrolling road if DOM-based.
Include touch swipe controls (touchstart/touchend) + Keyboard arrow keys.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (start-button, restart-button, game-canvas, pause-button).
AI-generated police radio text should pop up at random intervals in the 'radio_box' panel.
Ensure the game is responsive and fits within a mobile viewport constraints (max-width: 448px typically).
